final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing abstract expressionist artwork for modern art gallery display.

Style/medium: needs an "abstract expressionist" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Jackson Pollock's action painting, Willem de Kooning's gestural abstraction, Helen Frankenthaler's color-field soak-stain technique; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include abstract forms with no concrete imagery
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an emotionally charged, energetic atmosphere — exact mood balance is yours
Color palette: needs bold color collision direction — exact hue combinations are yours
Materials/textures: needs fluid brushstroke treatment — exact paint viscosity and stroke weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid: must avoid any concrete recognizable imagery
